hint: Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the BONExYARD stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the SNOWYxSHORES stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the LIMINALxDESERT stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the GORYxGRASSLANDS stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the FUNGALxFOREST stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the SMOLDERINGxDEPTHS stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the HEAVENLYxGATES stage.
Survive all waves and defeat the final boss in the VASTxVOID stage.

description: Complete the BONExYARD with 10 different characters
hint: You must beat the BONExYARD stage 10 separate times, selecting a different class for each successful run.
Beat the SNOWYxSHORES stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.
Beat the LIMINALxDESERT stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.
Beat the GORYxGRASSLANDS stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.
Beat the FUNGALxFOREST stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.
Beat the SMOLDERINGxDEPTHS stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.
Beat the HEAVENLYxGATES stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.
Beat the VASTxVOID stage 10 separate times, using a different class for each successful run.

description: Complete every level with The Warrior
hint: Play as The Warrior and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Recaller and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Itchy Finger and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Cogitator and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Tactician and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Spendthrift and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Embedded and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Radical AI and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Empty Nester and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Shade and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Cohabitants and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Physicist and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Brickhead and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as Sisyphus and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Flagellant and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Play as the Wimp and successfully complete all 8 standard biomes.
Upgrade any base ball to its maximum level during a run, and select its Evolution when offered.

description: Fuse two balls for the first time
hint: Max out and evolve two compatible balls. Once both are fully upgraded, the Fusion option will appear during your next level up.
Evolve and fuse the Bat and Leech/Blood type balls during a run. Check your Encyclopedia for the exact recipe.
Evolve and fuse the compatible explosive/bomb-type balls during a run. Check the Encyclopedia if you need the exact required balls.
Evolve and fuse the appropriate demonic/fire-type balls during a run. Use the in-game Encyclopedia for recipe hints.
Evolve and fuse the compatible ghost/scythe/soul balls to create the Soul Reaver.
Evolve and fuse the compatible sniper/projectile-based balls during a run.
This is cumulative across all your runs. Focus on AoE fusions and high-density late-game stages to farm kills quickly.
Cumulative across all runs. Destroy gold veins and collect drops over time.
Cumulative across all runs. Destroy wheat patches in grassy biomes.
Cumulative across all runs. Bounce your balls against trees to gather wood.
Cumulative across all runs. Break rocks and boulders to gather stone.

description: Mine 1000 gold in a single harvest
hint: Must be done in a single run. Equip balls with high piercing and bounce traits, and play on stages with high gold vein density.

description: Collect 100 wheat in a single harvest
hint: Must be done in a single run. Use wide AoE or bouncing balls on stages with lots of wheat.

description: Collect 100 wood in a single harvest
hint: Must be done in a single run. Prioritize forest-themed stages and use balls with high destruction/piercing stats.

description: Collect 100 stone in a single harvest
hint: Must be done in a single run. Use heavy/bouncing balls to clear lots of rock nodes quickly.
Blueprints drop from bosses and specific nodes during your runs. Keep playing and surviving longer to collect them all.
Find a Trophy blueprint during a run, then use resources to build it in your base menu.
Find a Monument blueprint during a run and construct it in your base to grant yourself infinitely scaling stats.
Unlock the Worker's Guild blueprint and build it in your base to improve resource automation and gathering.
Unlock the Evolution Chamber blueprint and construct it to assist in tracking and upgrading your ball evolutions.
Unlock the Relic Collector blueprint and build it to manage your collected run relics.
Unlock the Bag Maker blueprint and construct it in your base.
Unlock the Carpenter blueprint and construct it to unlock further wood-based upgrades and structures.
Purchase land expansions in your base menu using resources. Do this 5 times.

description: Reach +5 bonus in any attribute from a building
hint: Continuously invest resources to upgrade a stat-boosting building in your base until it provides a +5 bonus.

description: Reach S stat scaling in any attribute
hint: Upgrade the scaling multiplier of a specific attribute in your base until it reaches 'S' tier.
Build 15 houses in your base to increase your population and worker capacity.
Max out and evolve two separate balls during a run, then combine those two evolved forms into a single powerful Fusion.

description: Unlock every entry in the Encyclopedia
hint: Play with every character, unlock every base ball, trigger every evolution, and discover every fusion.
Defeat the final boss in VASTxVOID and complete the main progression of the game.
